title: Crispy Earthy Tomatoes Stir-fry
description: This show-off Russian dish features plum tomatoes that are sautéed to a crispy texture with Mediterranean-friendly flavors and earthy undertones.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add half of the olive oil.
Add halved plum tomatoes and minced garlic to the hot skillet, tossing gently until they begin to release their juices and start to brown slightly.
Sprinkle with salt and pour in lemon juice while ensuring the mixture is evenly coated with the oil. Stir-fry for about 3-5 minutes or until desired crispness is achieved.
Remove from heat immediately to prevent overcooking which can make them mushy.
